title: Efeo
compiled_truth: Efeo is an external contact at [Milbank](companies/milbank). Over the corpus period (2000-04-14 to 2001-10-15), Efeo sent 4 and received 54 emails, totalling 58 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (2), [Mark E Haedicke](people/mark-e-haedicke) (1), [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (1).
